name: fhe-x402-payment
description: FHE-encrypted x402 payments for OpenClaw agents using Zama canonical wrappers

network.name: Configurable (Sepolia default, Mainnet supported)
network.chainId: Set via CHAIN env var (default: auto-detect from RPC_URL)

amount.description: Amount of USDC to wrap (e.g. '2' for 2 USDC)

pay.description: Send encrypted cUSDC payment to another address via confidentialTransfer

amount.description: Amount of USDC to pay (e.g. '1' for 1 USDC)

unwrap.description: Request unwrap of cUSDC back to USDC (step 1 of 2, initiates KMS decryption)

finalize-unwrap.description: Finalize unwrap via publicDecrypt (recommended) or manual proof. Use --handle from the unwrap command output.

handle.description: Encrypted amount handle from the unwrap event (recommended — uses publicDecrypt to get cleartext + proof automatically)

requestId.description: Legacy: request ID for manual finalization (requires --cleartextAmount and --proof)

cleartextAmount.description: Legacy: decrypted cleartext amount (uint64) for manual finalization

proof.description: Legacy: decryption proof bytes for manual finalization

balance.description: Check wallet USDC balance and encrypted cUSDC handle. With --decrypt, decrypts your own cUSDC balance via Zama KMS. With --of, reads another agent's balance via delegation.

decrypt.description: Set to 'true' to decrypt your own cUSDC balance (requires @zama-fhe/sdk)

of.description: Ethereum address to read balance of (requires prior grant-view from that address)

info.description: Display wallet address, contract addresses, and network info

register-agent.description: Register this wallet as an agent in the on-chain identity registry

give-feedback.description: Submit reputation feedback for an agent

score.description: Reputation score as int128 (e.g. '80' for positive, '-10' for negative). Typical range: -100 to 100.

nonce.description: bytes32 nonce from a prior payment (used to derive proof-of-payment)

feedbackHash.description: Optional feedback hash (bytes32, defaults to zero)

create-job.description: Create a new escrow job on-chain

provider.description: Ethereum address of the provider (worker) for the job

evaluator.description: Ethereum address of the evaluator who can approve/reject

expiry.description: Job expiry in hours from now (e.g. '24' for 24 hours)

hook.description: Optional IACPHook contract address for lifecycle callbacks (must be whitelisted on the escrow). Defaults to address(0) (no hook).

fund-job.description: Fund an existing escrow job with encrypted cUSDC

jobId.description: The job ID (bytes32 or uint) to fund

amount.description: USDC amount to add to the escrow (e.g. '5' for 5 USDC)

complete-job.description: Approve or reject a job, releasing or refunding escrow funds

reason.description: Optional reason string (max 31 chars, encoded as bytes32)

grant-view.description: Grant another address read-only access to your encrypted cUSDC balance via Zama ACL delegation

delegate.description: Ethereum address to grant view access to

hours.description: Delegation duration in hours (default: 24). Ignored if --permanent is set.

permanent.description: Set to 'true' for permanent delegation (never expires)

contract.description: Contract address to delegate for (default: cUSDC). For amount verification, use the verifier address.

revoke-view.description: Revoke a delegate's read-only access to your encrypted cUSDC balance

delegate.description: Ethereum address to revoke view access from

view-as.description: Read another agent's encrypted cUSDC balance using delegated decryption (requires prior grant-view from the owner)

delegator.description: Ethereum address of the balance owner who granted you view access

research-and-visualize.description: Make 3 chained encrypted API payments for search, LLM analysis, and image generation

query.description: Research topic to search, analyze, and turn into a visual summary

review-and-rate.description: Buy a code review via encrypted payment and optionally submit proof-linked feedback

code.description: Code snippet or source text to review

language.description: Language label for the reviewer (default: typescript)

score.description: Feedback score to submit if CODE_REVIEW_AGENT_ID is configured (default: 80)

WALLET_MODE.description: Explicit signer mode: 'user' for local development, 'dfns' for unattended MPC-backed agents, or 'ledger-bridge' for supervised local Ledger approvals. If omitted, the skill preserves backward-compatible DFNS > USER_PRIVATE_KEY fallback.

DFNS_WALLET_ID.description: DFNS MPC wallet ID. Best fit for unattended agent runtimes and production-style automation.

DFNS_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Dfns authentication token (required when DFNS_WALLET_ID is set)

DFNS_CREDENTIAL_ID.description: Dfns credential ID used for User Action Signing (required when DFNS_WALLET_ID is set)

DFNS_CREDENTIAL_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Dfns credential private key in PEM format or with \n escapes (required when DFNS_WALLET_ID is set unless DFNS_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH is used)

DFNS_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH.description: Optional filesystem path to the Dfns credential private key PEM (alternative to DFNS_CREDENTIAL_PRIVATE_KEY)

DFNS_CREDENTIAL_ALGORITHM.description: Optional Node crypto.sign algorithm override for the Dfns credential signer

DFNS_APP_ID.description: Legacy Dfns application ID (optional; kept for backward compatibility)

DFNS_API_URL.description: Dfns API base URL (default: https://api.dfns.io). The skill uses it to auto-discover the wallet address and signingKey.id from DFNS_WALLET_ID.

USER_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Raw Ethereum private key. Best fit for local development, quick scripts, and simple single-user testing.

LEDGER_BRIDGE_URL.description: Localhost Ledger bridge base URL (default: http://127.0.0.1:4555). Used when WALLET_MODE=ledger-bridge, where OpenClaw stays headless and a local browser UI + Ledger device approve signatures.

LEDGER_BRIDGE_TOKEN.description: Shared secret for the localhost Ledger bridge. The OpenClaw runtime, daemon, and browser approval UI must all use the same value.

LEDGER_BRIDGE_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Approval timeout in milliseconds for supervised Ledger requests (default: 300000). Used when WALLET_MODE=ledger-bridge.

RPC_URL.description: Ethereum RPC URL (default: Sepolia public node)

CHAIN.description: Chain name: 'mainnet' or 'sepolia'. Auto-detected from RPC_URL if not set.

CUSDC_ADDRESS.description: Zama cUSDC (ERC-7984) address. Defaults: mainnet=0xe978..., sepolia=0x7c5B...

USDC_ADDRESS.description: Plaintext USDC ERC-20 address (default: Circle canonical for selected chain)

ESCROW_ADDRESS.description: AgenticCommerceProtocol address (required for create-job, fund-job, complete-job)
